Assignments.Title: Python Core Data Types & Operators: Engineering Problem-Solving Exercise
Assignments.TopicTitles: Variables and Assignment, Core Data Types, Operators in Python, Type Conversion
Assignments.ExtraInstructions:
The student will need to variables, the types of data, and operators to assign variables and solve a set of equations using the assigned variable values. This should cover an engineering scenario, should be completed in Colab,with text documentation in Colab, with a fulll description of the problem and the variables used, and the results and a conclusion of what the results mean. 

This should be submitted as web link to a Colab site.
